key_points: Media refers to different means of communication used to share information with large numbers of people
Mass media includes television, radio, newspapers, magazines, and the internet
Media plays an important role in spreading news, ideas, and information in society
Advertisements are a major source of income for media organizations
Media helps citizens stay informed and participate actively in a democratic society
examples: Television channels broadcast news and programs to millions of viewers
Newspapers report daily events happening locally and globally
Radio stations share news, music, and discussions with listeners
Advertisements on TV promote products like food, clothing, and electronics
News coverage of natural disasters informs people and encourages relief efforts
formulas: Media → Means of communication that spreads information to large audiences
Mass Media → Communication platforms like TV, radio, newspapers, and internet
Advertisement → Promotion of products or services through media
exam_tips: Understand the meaning and role of media in society
Learn the different types of media such as print, electronic, and digital
Remember how advertisements influence media content
Focus on the role of media in informing citizens and supporting democracy
